definitions.text: A syntactic marker. A syntactic marker in a question whose main verb is not another auxiliary verb or be.
examples: I do not go there often.

definitions.text: A syntactic marker in a question whose main verb is not another auxiliary verb or be.
A party, celebration, social function; usually of moderate size and formality.
examples: We’re having a bit of a do on Saturday to celebrate my birthday.
I don't like to spend time on my hairstyle, so I usually just wear a do-rag.

definitions.text: A syllable used in solfège to represent the first and eighth tonic of a major scale.
The cardinal number occurring after el and before do one in a duodecimal system. Written 10, decimal value 12.
